name: Rotating Actor
description: An actor that rotates continuously around a specified axis. Uses AddActorLocalRotation on Tick. Great for spinning obstacles, rotating platforms, or decorative elements.

customizable.rotation_axis: Which axis to rotate around: Yaw, Pitch, or Roll (default: Yaw)

blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_RotatingActor}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_BeginPlay
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="Rotating Actor Active"]
NODE n3: Event_Tick
NODE n4: MakeRotator [Yaw={{rotation_speed|1.0}}]
NODE n5: AddActorLocalRotation

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n3.Then -> n5.Execute

DATA n4.ReturnValue -> n5.DeltaRotation [Rotator]

example_spawn.notes: Place elevated so rotation is visible
